entities.name: MULTI-CROP MILLET PLANTER
entities.description: A field-validated mechanization prototype designed for precise, efficient, and residue-friendly planting across various crops.

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop for which the planter is designed.

entities.name: DRYLAND SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural environments characterized by low rainfall where the planter is deployed.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Traditional farming practices under which the planter is operational.

entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Sustainable farming practices focusing on minimal soil disturbance under which the planter is operational.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research organization responsible for the development of the Multi-Crop Millet Planter.

entities.name: SOWING
entities.description: The process of planting seeds in the soil.
